DocsCLI Referencesupervisor
DocsCLI Referencesupervisor

supervisor

Start the Bld supervisor process. This command is used internally by the Bld server — it is not intended to be invoked directly.

Previous stop Next worker
bld

Simple and blazingly fast CI/CD.
Run pipelines anywhere.
